name: debian-arm64
description: Tiny PoC rootfs with source-built guest GLES/EGL shim API smoke, libEGL/libGLESv2 ABI-name smoke, eglGetProcAddress GLES demo workload, es2gears-like GLES demo workload, syscall-heavy benchmark fixture, LD_PRELOAD path fast path shim with glibc stat metadata directory stream realpath mkstemp rename mkdir unlink rmdir and fakeroot chown compatibility, multi-frame clear and triangle draw GLES workloads, TCP loopback guest GPU bridge client, clean extraction schema, dpkg-split smoke, apt/dpkg bundle, and local package installed-script smoke.
